title: Israeli Forces Raid New Area in Southern Lebanon, Bombard Near Beirut
summary_full: Joseph Aoun, the Lebanese president, called for direct talks with Israel to end the fighting. He also leveled blame at Hezbollah, the Iran-backed group, for igniting the war.
summary_public: Joseph Aoun, the Lebanese president, called for direct talks with Israel to end the fighting. He also leveled blame at Hezbollah, the Iran-backed group, for igniting the war.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Hezbollah, the Iran-backed group, for igniting the war.
